changes: Core requirements formalize eight HALOS principles
JSON Schema for manifest, core, extension, changelog
Spec generation derives human-readable docs from JSON
Breaking: governance field changed from single object to array of policy references
Supports artifacts under multiple concurrent governance policies
Clarifies relationship between governance array and policyEvaluations array
Migration path documented for v0.2 to v0.3 upgrade
Graph model: entities, activities, and relationships (aligned with W3C PROV)
Decision provenance: first-class tracking of human decisions with AI inputs
Human-AI interaction semantics: structured recording of accepted/modified/rejected
Responsibility modeling: roles and delegation on graph entities
Policy evaluation traces: records of automated or manual policy checks
Task type and techniques fields for AI contribution specificity
Initial provenance spec: flat document model
Required fields: artifact, human_author, ai_assistance, timestamp
Optional fields: review, governance, lineage, notes
Embedding patterns for CycloneDX and SLSA
